constraints.layout_style: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)

reference_templates.notes: micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator

reference_templates.title: Triple nested fieldsets
reference_templates.notes: Fieldset inside fieldset inside fieldset with legends at each level

reference_templates.title: Number min max experience
reference_templates.notes: Years of experience number input with min/max constraints

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Reference DOM (Micro1 Q label pattern): micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator Reference DOM (Triple nested fieldsets): Fieldset inside fieldset inside fieldset with legends at each level Reference DOM (Number min max experience): Years of experience number input with min/max constraints Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: custom-combobox, split-phone, aria-label-only, div-role-textbox, duplicate-name-attrs. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Micro1 Q label pattern; Triple nested fieldsets; Number min max experience.
